name: Sleep
description: Casts creatures into slumber: 2-16 first-level types (up to 1+1 hit dice), or 2-12 second-level types (up to 2+1 hit dice), or 1-6 third- or fourth-level types (up to 4+1 hit dice). The full number rolled is always affected; if more candidates stand within reach than the dice allow, choose the sleepers at random. Range: 24".
period_conventions: 'effects' printed for 'affects' in source; mechanics unchanged
